public_apis.name: MsQuicConnectionOpen
public_apis.signature: QUIC_STATUS MsQuicConnectionOpen(HQUIC RegistrationHandle, QUIC_CONNECTION_CALLBACK_HANDLER Handler, void* Context, HQUIC* NewConnection)
postconditions: On success: *NewConnection is valid connection handle

public_apis.name: MsQuicConnectionOpenInPartition
public_apis.signature: QUIC_STATUS MsQuicConnectionOpenInPartition(HQUIC RegistrationHandle, uint16_t PartitionIndex, QUIC_CONNECTION_CALLBACK_HANDLER Handler, void* Context, HQUIC* NewConnection)
postconditions: On success: *NewConnection is valid connection with Partitioned=TRUE

public_apis.name: MsQuicConnectionClose
postconditions: If not on worker: blocks until close processed

public_apis.name: MsQuicConnectionShutdown
public_apis.signature: void MsQuicConnectionShutdown(HQUIC Handle, QUIC_CONNECTION_SHUTDOWN_FLAGS Flags, QUIC_UINT62 ErrorCode)
preconditions: Handle is CONNECTION or STREAM handle

public_apis.name: MsQuicConnectionStart
public_apis.signature: QUIC_STATUS MsQuicConnectionStart(HQUIC Handle, HQUIC ConfigHandle, QUIC_ADDRESS_FAMILY Family, const char* ServerName, uint16_t ServerPort)

public_apis.name: MsQuicConnectionSetConfiguration
preconditions: Handle is SERVER connection or STREAM on server connection
ConfigHandle is valid CONFIGURATION with SecurityConfig

public_apis.name: MsQuicStreamOpen
public_apis.signature: QUIC_STATUS MsQuicStreamOpen(HQUIC Handle, QUIC_STREAM_OPEN_FLAGS Flags, QUIC_STREAM_CALLBACK_HANDLER Handler, void* Context, HQUIC* NewStream)
preconditions: Handle is CONNECTION or STREAM handle
postconditions: On success: *NewStream is valid stream handle

public_apis.name: MsQuicStreamSend
public_apis.signature: QUIC_STATUS MsQuicStreamSend(HQUIC Handle, const QUIC_BUFFER* Buffers, uint32_t BufferCount, QUIC_SEND_FLAGS Flags, void* ClientSendContext)

public_apis.name: MsQuicSetParam
public_apis.signature: QUIC_STATUS MsQuicSetParam(HQUIC Handle, uint32_t Param, uint32_t BufferLength, const void* Buffer)
preconditions: Global params: Handle must be NULL
Non-global params: Handle must be valid typed handle
public_apis.note: QUIC_PARAM_HIGH_PRIORITY flag routes to priority queue

public_apis.name: MsQuicGetParam
public_apis.signature: QUIC_STATUS MsQuicGetParam(HQUIC Handle, uint32_t Param, uint32_t* BufferLength, void* Buffer)
preconditions: Global params: Handle must be NULL
public_apis.note: QUIC_PARAM_HIGH_PRIORITY flag routes to priority queue

public_apis.name: MsQuicDatagramSend
public_apis.signature: QUIC_STATUS MsQuicDatagramSend(HQUIC Handle, const QUIC_BUFFER* Buffers, uint32_t BufferCount, QUIC_SEND_FLAGS Flags, void* ClientSendContext)
postconditions: On success: datagram queued via QuicDatagramQueueSend
